message:
test(fcp-store): add 46 tests across gc, coverage, object_store, quarantine

Expand test coverage for undertested modules:
- gc.rs: +12 tests (serde, clone/debug, cyclic refs, mixed retention, pinned roots, would_collect chains)
- coverage.rs: +15 tests (deficit, diversity, debug, single symbol, add/remove cycles, edge cases)
- object_store.rs: +8 tests (accumulation, boundary, retention transitions, multi-zone)
- quarantine.rs: +11 tests (serde, multi-zone, clone/debug, eviction edge cases)

fcp-store now at 444 tests (was 398), all passing, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
